source_title: 07 Lighting/03 The Cinematic Lighting Framework - Unreal for VFX

evidences.content: let's talk about lighting 我们来谈谈灯光 I think most people have it backwards and lighting in visual effects has been a 我认为大多数人都弄反了，视觉效果中的灯光一直是 very technical exercise a lot of the times because a lot of it is optimizing our render 很多时候都是非常技术性的练习，因为其中很多内容都是优化我们的渲染 times to make sure that we're spending only a couple hours per frame instead of 确保我们只花费几个小时来渲染每一帧，而不是 seven or eight hours for a single frame 为一帧花费七八个小时 But all of that gets thrown out when we have real-time lighting inside of Unreal Engine 但是，当我们在虚幻引擎中使用实时灯光时，所有这些都被抛弃了 I really want to just focus on the creative side 我真的只想专注于创意方面 We'll get into the technical side later on 我们稍后会涉及到技术方面 but I think it's really worth rethinking our 但我认为重新思考我们的做法真的很值得 approach to lighting as a creative exercise 将灯光视为创意练习的方式 We're going to throw out the old school slow VFX and replace it for making creative decisions 我们将抛弃老式的缓慢视觉效果，并用它来做出创意决策 and trying out new ideas constantly all in real time 并且在实时中不断尝试新的想法 before we were punished for trying out creative ideas by having longer and longer 以前，我们尝试创意想法时会受到越来越长的惩罚 render times by adding in lights or trying out different things and not really having 通过添加灯光或尝试不同的事物，而不是真正拥有 a clear idea of what it would look like until all of our samples were rendered and we got 在渲染所有样本并获得 a noiseless render 一个无噪声的渲染 we should be replacing that time that was spent noodling around with the technical 我们应该用技术来替代那些浪费的时间 settings and waiting for renders in the first place with improving our lighting 首先通过改进我们的灯光设置和等待渲染来提高我们的灯光效果 I want to tackle a simple creative approach to how we can think about lighting 我想先从一个简单的创意方法来思考如何处理灯光问题 inside of Unreal 在虚幻引擎中 And before we get all the way into it 在我们深入讨论之前 I have heard over and over again that Unreal doesn't 我一遍又一遍地听说虚幻引擎不会 render AOVs 渲染AOV but this is not true 但这并不是真的 This is totally untrue 这完全是不真实的 It's actually pretty easy 实际上相当简单 Most people just don't know how to use them 大多数人只是不知道如何使用它们 But an important note that I want to make 但我想要强调的一个重要事项 after making a few different pre-visits and 在制作了几个不同的预览之后 short films all inside of Unreal and rendering them through Nuke 在Unreal中制作了一些短片，并通过Nuke进行渲染 I have found time and time 我一次又一次地发现 again that because the render times are so fast 由于渲染时间非常快 it is honestly a lot faster to make 实际上，制作起来要快得多 those creative changes in Unreal and re-rendering our frames instead of going into Nuke and 在Unreal中进行这些创意改变并重新渲染我们的帧，而不是进入Nuke并 using AOVs to fine-tune them 使用AOV来微调它们 All of those tools that you would be using in comp are available to you in Unreal 在Unreal中，您可以使用在合成中使用的所有工具 it is significantly faster to be doing all of these creative changes in real time 实时进行所有这些创意改变要快得多 Through decals 通过贴花 through changing material instances 通过更改材质实例 things like that 诸如此类的事情 just much faster to do it in Unreal 在Unreal中做这些要快得多 So let's go through some lighting fundamentals and talk about the creative approach to lighting 让我们来了解一些照明基础知识，并谈谈照明的创造性方法 So we're going to talk about three different concepts here 所以我们将在这里讨论三个不同的概念 I really like keeping these simple so we have a basic framework to go back to 我真的很喜欢保持这些简单，这样我们就有一个基本框架可以回到 and the first 第一个是 one is going to be light direction 一个是光的方向 So this is where you place your light and how you angle it in relation to your subject 所以这是您放置光源的位置以及与主体的角度关系 and how focused your light is 以及您的光有多集中 If you think about the cone angle of a spotlight versus a point light 如果您考虑聚光灯和点光源的锥角 which just casts light 只是投射光线 in every single direction 在每个方向上 where we aim our light is as important as where we're placing 我们瞄准光源的位置和我们放置光源的位置一样重要 The next is the size of our light source 接下来是我们光源的大小 and this can be a bit confusing because I 这可能有点令人困惑，因为我 don't think a lot of people are considering this inside of CG because typically you just 我认为很多人在计算机图形中没有考虑到这一点，因为通常你只是 throw your light source into a scene and it's an arbitrary size 将你的光源投射到场景中，大小是任意的 But when you look on set 但是当你看到现场时 you think of the different lights and different diffusion is 你会考虑到不同的灯光和不同的扩散 used on set 用于现场的 and there's just two rules that come with that 这其中只有两个规则 which are larger lights create 其中一个是较大的灯光会产生 softer shadows 更柔和的阴影 So if you think of a soft box on a light 所以如果你想到一个灯上的软盒子 we're increasing the surface area of that 我们增加了它的表面积 but a small light is going to create hard shadows 但是小的光源会产生硬阴影 So I would actually consider the sun a small light because relative to us on planet Earth 所以实际上，我认为太阳是一个小光源，因为相对于我们地球上的人来说 it's actually a pretty small light source 它实际上是一个相当小的光源 But this also would be the case with a light bulb 但是灯泡也是如此 like a light bulb you'd find at Home 就像你在家里找到的灯泡 Depot that you're placing in your scene 你放在场景中的灯泡 The smaller the light source itself 光源本身越小 the harder the shadows are going to be 阴影就会越硬 And the last topic that we'll cover is color 我们要讨论的最后一个主题是颜色 and this is where we can add a lot of life 在这里我们可以增添很多生气 and emotion into our images by making interesting creative decisions with color 通过在颜色上做出有趣的创意决策，为我们的图像增添情感 But let's talk about each of these in a bit more depth 但是让我们更深入地讨论一下这些内容 and let's talk about light direction 我们来谈谈光的方向 And light direction is all about creating shapes through lights and shadows 光的方向是通过光和阴影来创造形状 So whether it's a human face or a spaceship 所以无论是人脸还是宇宙飞船 where we place our light and the direction 我们放置光的位置和方向 that we point our light in is going to define what shape is represented by that light 我们照射光的方向将决定光所代表的形状是什么 And I think especially when you're setting up lights for the first time 我觉得特别是当你第一次设置灯光时 helpful to isolate them 将它们隔离开会很有帮助 turn all of the lights off in your scene 在你的场景中关闭所有的灯光 and go one by one by one 逐个进行调试 and really see exactly what shape is being created by this light 看清楚这个灯光所创造的形状 Now lighting human faces I think is really helpful 现在，我认为照亮人脸是非常有帮助的 especially because if we're using 尤其是因为如果我们使用的是 Unreal for visual effects 虚幻引擎进行视觉效果制作 that means we're using it to make movies 这意味着我们用它来制作电影 and we're going to 而且我们将会 need characters in our shots 在我们的镜头中需要角色 and we should be lighting the human face 我们应该照亮人脸 or a character's 或者角色的 face if it's not a human face 如果不是人脸的话 in most of our shots 在我们的大部分镜头中 Very few shots in a movie are going to be those wide environment shots that you might 电影中很少有那些你可能会遇到的广阔环境镜头 associate with Unreal Engine 与虚幻引擎相关联 So I think this is a really good place to start when thinking of lighting 所以我认为这是一个非常好的起点，当我们考虑灯光时 effect the light direction has on an actor's face 灯光方向对演员的脸部产生的影响 So there's three different light directions which will help us just get started 所以有三种不同的光照方向，这将帮助我们开始 And the first we have here on the bottom left you can see is front lighting 而我们在左下角看到的第一种是前灯光 lighting primarily the front side of our actor's face 主要照亮演员脸部的正面 This is also known as fill lighting 这也被称为填充灯光 this is kind of our three-point lighting framework 这是我们的三点光照框架的一部分 although I don't really like to think of three-point lighting in that way 虽然我不太喜欢以那种方式思考三点光照 We also have side lighting 我们还有侧面照明 which would typically be our key light 通常是我们的主光源 and this is just because 这是因为 from the side we can create a little bit more shape than through our front lights 从侧面我们可以创造出比正面灯光更多的形状 And then we also have back lighting 还有背光 and this is usually our rim light 这通常是我们的背光 or it's also known 或者也被称为 as a hair light 头发灯 depending on who you talk to 取决于你和谁谈论 And as you can see from the pictures 从图片中可以看到 each one of these is going to give us a different 每一个都会给我们带来不同的 feeling and a different shape on a human's face 感觉和人脸的不同形状 With our fill lighting 通过我们的填充灯 creating a much bigger 创造一个更大的 flatter shape 更平坦的形状 and we're getting more and 我们得到更多的 more contrast from our side and back lighting 来自侧面和背面灯光的更多对比度 It's also really important to note that in this example below 还需要注意的是，在下面的例子中非常重要的一点是 whether you realize it 无论你是否意识到 the light and the actor are in the same exact position in each shot 在每一镜头中，光线和演员的位置都完全相同 It's just the camera that's moving 只是相机在移动 So it's really important that you set up your camera before you light your scene 因此，在照明场景之前设置好相机非常重要 least get a good idea of where your camera and where your talent is going to be in a scene 至少要清楚相机和演员在场景中的位置 because based on their position in the frame 因为根据它们在画面中的位置 the different shapes that we'll want to draw 我们想要绘制的不同形状 out through our light position and our light direction 通过我们的光源位置和光源方向 So let's talk a bit about front lighting 那么，让我们稍微谈谈前灯光 The height of your light can dramatically change how this feels 灯光的高度可以极大地改变这种感觉 On our top example 在我们的顶部示例中 it kind of looks like a flash 它有点像闪光灯 the camera flash 相机闪光灯 just hitting him 正好打在他身上 And this really flattens out the face and doesn't really create any shapes 这样会使脸部变平，并且不会产生任何形状 If you look at just between the top example and the bottom one 如果你只看顶部示例和底部示例之间的区别 the different shapes we 我们所看到的不同形状 get in our light and our shadow areas 在我们的光源和阴影区域中 It obviously feels a lot more dramatic on our middle example because we're getting shadows 在我们的中间示例中，因为有阴影，所以显然更具戏剧性。 under the eyes 在眼睛下方 underneath the lips and underneath the neck 在嘴唇下方和脖子下方 So the height really can affect how those shadows are cast and it's worth dragging around 因此，高度确实会影响阴影的投射方式，值得调整一下。 your light up and down 将灯光上下移动 left and right to see exactly what effect that's going to have 左右移动，看看会产生什么效果 And the more front light you have 而且，你拥有的前置光越多 the less fill light you'll typically need because with 你通常需要的填充光就越少，因为有了 a front light 前置光 we have less shadows overall 总体上，我们的阴影较少 And if we're using this front light as our key light 而且，如果我们将这个前置光用作主光源 in this case 在这种情况下 we'll need a lot 我们将需要很多 less fill to even out our subject 更少的填充光来均匀化我们的主体 Now here we have side lighting 现在我们有侧面照明 Key lights are often from the side 主光源通常来自侧面 It's not purely on the side 并不完全在侧面 In this case 在这种情况下 the light is clearly in front of him as opposed to a 90 degree angle from 光明显在他面前，而不是与他成90度角 his ear outward 从他的耳朵向外延伸 like we're getting on our bottom two examples 就像我们在下面的两个示例中看到的那样 And in my opinion 而且在我看来 these create a lot more depth and interesting shapes 这些会产生更多的层次感和有趣的形状 a human face compared to pure front lighting 与纯粹的前置光相比，人脸上 There's also this idea in portrait lighting known as Rembrandt lighting 肖像照明中还有一种被称为伦勃朗照明的概念 which is typically 通常是 associated with getting this triangle on the opposite side of the face from where the light 与在光线的对面脸部形成三角形有关 is casting out 投射出去的地方 So here the light is casting from screen right and then on his left cheek 所以这里的光线从屏幕右侧投射，然后照在他的左脸颊上 this nice triangle and that's a nice way to know that we're getting light wrapping around 这个漂亮的三角形，这是一种了解我们得到的光线环绕的好方法 our actor and we get a little bit more detail than what you might be seeing from these bottom 我们的演员和我们可以看到一些细节，比你从下面看到的更多 two examples 两个例子 And then lastly is backlighting 最后是背光 So this is known as a rim light or a hair light 所以这被称为边光或者头发光 especially because if our subject has a lot of hair 尤其是因为我们的主题有很多头发 this is a great way to 这是一个很好的方法来 not get a lot of spill on the front side of our actor 不在我们演员的正面产生很多溢出 But hair is going to illuminate in a much different way than even the rim around this 但是头发会以一种与周围的边光截然不同的方式发光 girl's chin and neck 女孩的下巴和脖子 This is mostly coming from her hair 这主要是来自她的头发 not from the light actually being cast onto her skin 而不是光线实际上照射到她的皮肤上 So this is a great way to get some additional shape and also help us separate our characters 所以这是一个很好的方法来获得一些额外的形状，也帮助我们分离角色 from our background by getting this nice rim like we're getting at the top or by introducing 通过在顶部获得这个漂亮的边光，或者通过引入 a lot of volumetric fog and not necessarily getting those pings of light on the hair 大量的体积雾，而不一定在头发上获得那些亮点 itself but by creating silhouettes of the characters as a whole by really lifting up 通过真正提升角色的整体轮廓来创造角色的轮廓 that background where we can see the light source like there's a train behind our actor 我们可以看到背景中的光源，就像我们的演员后面有一辆火车一样 from the assassination of Jesse James and that does a lot of the work for us where we 这来自于《杰西·詹姆斯的刺杀》，这为我们做了很多工作 actually really don't care about getting clear 实际上，我们真的不在乎得到清晰的 clean lighting on our actor 我们演员的清洁照明 That actually may take away from a shot like this 这实际上可能会减弱这样的一个镜头 especially for this dramatic effect 尤其是为了这种戏剧效果 that they're going for 他们正在追求的效果 So that's light direction 所以这就是光的方向 Now let's talk about the size of the light 现在让我们来谈谈光的大小 So just to repeat what we're talking about earlier 所以只是重复一下我们之前谈到的内容 the bigger the light 光越大 the softer 阴影就越柔和 the shadows are going to be and the smaller the light 阴影就越硬 the harder the shadows are going 阴影就越硬 So this is all about what emotion we want to feel out of a scene 所以这就是关于我们想要从一个场景中感受到的情感。 A movie like Arrival 像《降临》这样的电影 did not use a lot of harsh light 没有使用很多刺眼的光线 They wanted this stormier 他们想要更加暴风雨般的氛围 overcast feeling throughout the entire piece 在整个片子中都有一种阴沉的感觉 So they used a lot of soft light sources 所以他们使用了很多柔和的光源 a lot of light tubes 很多灯管 and not a lot of small 而不是很多小型的 practical light sources 实用的光源 And let's take a look at what the difference is here 现在让我们来看看这里的区别是什么 So here in our example 所以在我们的例子中 we have hard light 我们有刺眼的光线 We get a really harsh shadow on the nose 鼻子上有一个非常刺眼的阴影 We get really dark shadows on the screen left side of her body and we get a crisp line by 她身体的屏幕左侧有非常黑暗的阴影，而且我们得到了一个清晰的线条 her cheek where the key light goes from the brights into the shadows 她的脸颊上的主光源从明亮处进入阴影处 And by replacing this spotlight with an area light or a rectangle light 通过用区域光或矩形光取代这个聚光灯 you can see we 你可以看到我们 get a lot more detail in our shadows 在我们的阴影中得到了更多的细节 The lighting on her face is a lot softer overall and it gives us a different feeling 她脸上的光线整体上更加柔和，给我们一种不同的感觉 Now if we're going to justify that this entire dungeon area is lit by torch lights 现在如果我们要证明整个地牢区域都是由火炬照明的 probably have a much harsher light 可能会有更加刺眼的光线 That would be what's more realistic in this case 在这种情况下更加真实 But it's worth trying out different things 但是值得尝试不同的方法 seeing what works 看看哪种方法有效 At the end of the day 说到底 movies are cheating their lighting in every single shot 电影在每一帧中都在欺骗光线 So it really is what emotion do we want to feel out of this shot in particular as opposed 所以真正重要的是，我们想从这一镜头中感受到什么样的情感，相对于 to what is exactly true to life 与真实生活相符的情感 But it's always important to know what the reality should be and make it a conscious 但是了解现实应该是什么，并且有意识地去创造它，这总是很重要的 decision to be breaking reality when we're going to do that 当我们打算打破现实时，决策是必要的。 This is why it's important to know the rules in the first place and once we've mastered 这就是为什么首先了解规则并掌握它们非常重要的原因。 those basics 那些基础知识 then we can start to break the rules 然后我们可以开始打破规则 So soft shadows 所以柔和的阴影 these can be created in real life by adding diffusion to your lights 在现实生活中，可以通过在灯光上添加扩散来创建这些柔和的阴影 So on set it's very common to take a harsh spotlight and it's a little bit hard to see 在拍摄现场，经常会使用强烈的聚光灯，有点难以看清 here because the light is bouncing around behind the front of this glass here 因为光线在这个玻璃的前面反射 But it really is all coming from a small little bulb and typically this is how most lights 但实际上，所有的光都来自一个小小的灯泡，通常大部分灯光都是这样的 are going to be on a film set as long as they're not a area light like a RE Sky panel 只要它们不是像RE Sky面板那样的区域光源，大部分灯光都会在电影拍摄现场使用 or something that is a grid of LEDs 或者是由LED组成的网格灯光 If it's coming from a small source like this 如果光源来自这样一个小的地方 usually there will be some sort of lens on 通常会有一种透镜 the front of that light to focus it 在灯光的前面以便聚焦 But diffusion will be added in front to create a bigger surface area for that light to be 但是会在前面添加扩散，以便为光线创造一个更大的表面积 coming from 发出的光线 It's also very common instead of just diffusing that light to get it even softer 为了使光线更柔和，通常不仅仅是扩散光线 lights will be pointed at a bounce board 灯光会照射到一个反射板上 just a white piece of cloth or diffusion 只是一块白色的布或扩散材料 And in this case that light is cast onto the white sheet and then from there that bounce 在这种情况下，光线被投射到白色的布上，然后从那里反射 light is being cast back onto the actor's face 光线被反射回演员的脸上 And we can recreate the feeling of this with rectangle lights and setting up diffusion 我们可以用矩形灯光和设置扩散来再现这种感觉 in this way 以这种方式 Although it is worth knowing Lumen is not going to recreate this perfectly because Lumen 尽管值得知道Lumen不会完美地再现这一点，因为Lumen is based on screen spaces 是基于屏幕空间的 But if you think about how the light is actually hitting our actor here 但是如果你考虑一下光线实际上是如何照射到我们的演员身上的 the light is the 光线是 bounce light coming from this area light 来自这个区域光源的反射光线 So this light is blasting at this white sheet and much less light is actually being emitted 所以这个光线在这张白纸上爆发，实际上发出的光线要少得多 from that light source 来自那个光源 So in this case we could just recreate where that bounce would be and use a less intense 所以在这种情况下，我们可以重新创建反弹的位置，并使用一个不那么强烈的 light to recreate some bounce lighting like this 光线来重新创建一些像这样的反弹光 And even outside it's important to know on a sunny day you can see the difference between 甚至在室外，重要的是要知道在晴天，你可以看到 the quality of light on our actor's face in the middle and how harsh the sun is on 我们演员脸上的光线质量和太阳的强烈程度之间的区别 the actors behind him 他身后的演员 So there's no reason just because you have a sunny day outside in your environment that 所以，仅仅因为你在室外有一个晴天并不意味着 doesn't mean we need really harsh lights on our actor's faces 我们的演员脸上就需要非常强烈的光线 We can recreate this type of diffusion with rectangle lights to achieve softer lighting 我们可以使用矩形灯光重新创建这种扩散效果，以实现更柔和的照明 during a sunny exterior scene 在阳光明媚的室外场景中 So for soft shadows we can do this by adding diffusion to our lights by just creating rectangle 所以，为了得到柔和的阴影，我们可以通过给灯光添加扩散效果来做到这一点，只需创建矩形 lights instead of spotlights or point lights days typically because instead of our sun becoming 柔和的阴影通常来自阴天，因为我们的太阳不再是 the light source 光源 the sun illuminates the clouds 太阳照亮了云朵 the entire sky into a much softer 整个天空变得更柔和 wider source of light
